case_title: AMERICAN FLOWERS BROKERS VS. SUNNY COUNTY FOODS

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-02-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-02-2019 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF. PLAINTIFF AMERICAN FLOWERS BROKERS IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY JON GOMEZ OWNER. DEFENDANT SUNNY COUNTRY FOODS IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY MOURICE KARI MANAGER. DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
